candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Non-current assets, not current assets; included only because it appeared in the shortlist.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement cash balance, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents in beginning of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement opening cash, not the preferred balance-sheet measure.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line as required.

candidates.why: Semantically relevant but appears blank; the explicit total line is cleaner.
Balancing item, not preferred when a reported total exists.

variables.notes: Preferred the explicit total rather than blank or balancing lines.

candidates.why: Clean balance-sheet line for current financing debt; aligns with short-term debt and excludes trade payables. Preferable to a generic maturity line.
Could represent current maturities of debt, but values are blank and a cleaner total current debt line exists.

variables.notes: R:c. Chose a confident label outside the shortlist. It is the best balance-sheet measure of short-term interest-bearing debt and does not mention leases.

candidates.why: Most direct balance-sheet tax payable/current tax liabilities label, though preview values are blank.
Tax-related but non-current/deferred, so not taxes payable.
Tax asset/receivable, opposite of taxes payable.

variables.notes: Chose a confident label outside the shortlist. 'Tax Liabilities' is the closest exact balance-sheet payable tax line; blanks in preview do not invalidate it.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet PPE line; preferred total/net PPE measure.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Tangible asset subcomponent related to leases, not preferred over total PPE.
Balancing line, not preferred when a reported PPE line exists.

variables.notes: Used the exact reported PPE line.

candidates.why: Exact total assets line on the balance sheet.

candidates.why: Exact net operating cash flow line.
